info.name: Amadeus Search Hotels Using its Unique ID

items.docs: Amadeus Search Hotels Using its Unique ID

info.name: Amadeus Search Hotels in a City

params.name: cityCode
params.description: Destination city code or airport code. In case of city  code , the search will be done around the city center. Available codes can be found in [IATA table codes](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx) (3 chars IATA Code).

params.name: radius
params.description: Maximum distance from the geographical coordinates express in defined units. The default unit is metric kilometer.

params.name: radiusUnit
params.description: Unit of measurement used to express the radius. It can be either metric kilometer or imperial mile.

params.name: chainCodes
params.description: Array of hotel chain codes. Each code is a string consisted of 2 capital alphabetic characters.

params.name: ratings
params.description: Hotel stars. Up to four values can be requested at the same time in a comma separated list.

params.name: hotelSource
params.description: Hotel source with values BEDBANK for aggregators, DIRECTCHAIN for GDS/Distribution and ALL for both.

items.docs: Amadeus Search Hotels in a City

params.name: latitude
params.description: The latitude of the searched geographical point expressed in geometric degrees.

params.name: longitude
params.description: The longitude of the searched geographical point expressed in geometric degrees.

params.name: radius
params.description: Maximum distance from the geographical coordinates expressed in defined units. The default unit is metric kilometer.

params.name: radiusUnit
params.description: Unit of measurement used to express the radius. It can be either metric kilometer or imperial mile.

params.name: chainCodes
params.description: Array of hotel chain codes. Each code is a string consisted of 2 capital alphabetic characters.

params.name: ratings
